nodes.label: Medical/Health Visual Identity Motif
nodes.description: The heart+ECG (electrocardiogram) pulse line is a universally recognized medical/health iconography motif. Despite DermCalc being a dermatology calculator app, the icon uses cardiology-adjacent health symbolism, suggesting a general medical/clinical app identity.

nodes.label: XXXHDPI Density Icons
nodes.description: Set of launcher icons at xxxhdpi density (~192x192dp, highest resolution): ic_launcher.webp, ic_launcher_foreground.webp, ic_launcher_round.webp
